data.verdict: Gate 2 WEAK. Isolated demand signal: no GitHub repos surfaced; no subreddit metadata available; 5 recent launch mention(s) on PH/TC. Single-dimension evidence — broaden candidate_subreddits / candidate_repos and re-run, or treat as insufficient.
